title: Social Post V0.1.5
lead: We're thrilled to announce a major update packed with developer-friendly features!
content_markdown:
# 🚀 GIDEVO API Tool v0.1.5 is Live!

We're thrilled to announce a major update packed with developer-friendly features!

## ✨ What's New

**Beautiful CLI Experience** - Professional ASCII banners, progress indicators, and consistent styling across all commands.

**Interactive Wizard Mode** - New users? Run `gidevo-api-tool --interactive` for guided setup through project initialization and code generation.

**Configuration Files** - Use `.gidevorc.json` to set project defaults and streamline workflows across your team.

**Comprehensive Examples** - Jump-start development with TypeScript, Python examples + sample plugins and OpenAPI specs (Petstore, Todo API).

**Enhanced Commands** - Shorter aliases (gen, val, i, p), better error messages, and extended help with real-world examples.

## 🎯 Perfect For

- Building multi-language API clients from OpenAPI specs
- Teams standardizing on consistent SDK generation
- Developers integrating APIs into diverse tech stacks

## 🏃 Quick Start

```bash
npm install -g gidevo-api-tool
gidevo-api-tool --interactive
```

Explore examples: `examples/basic-typescript`, `examples/basic-python`

**Try it today!** 👉 https://github.com/LehroSolutions/gidevo-api-tool

All 29 tests passing. Production-ready. Open source.
